cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 42% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -1.04% · Gold -0.13% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 42% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.99%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.99%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.44%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -6.30%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +2.99%, BIDU +2.74%, NET +2.48%, WDAY +2.15%, ORCL +1.97%. Laggards: SKHY -6.30%, ARM -4.62%, TSM -4.08%, AMD -3.21%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.29% at $135.66
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.29% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
